description: Tests if an outcome at a specific position matches a given value. Used as a predicate inside event() expressions. The position is 1-indexed corresponding to the factor order in the sample space.

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
E = event(S, match(1, 6), fc(coral))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), coin(2))
E = event(S, match(2, "H"), fc(tomato))
